member.name: T:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController
member.summary: Manages attendance records in the DBTC Attendance Management System.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController.GetAttendances(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all attendance records with optional pagination.
member.response: Returns paginated list of attendance records

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController.GetAttendance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single attendance record by ID.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController.GetByClass(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all attendance records for a specific class.
member.param: The class ID to filter by
member.response: Returns attendance records for the class

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController.CreateAttendance(AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.AttendanceDTO)
member.summary: Mark attendance for a student.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController.UpdateAttendance(System.Int32,AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.AttendanceDTO)
member.summary: Update an attendance record.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.AttendancesController.DeleteAttendance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an attendance record by ID.

member.name: T:AMS.Controllers.ClassesController
member.summary: Manages class sections in the DBTC Attendance Management System.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.ClassesController.GetClasses(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all classes with optional pagination.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.ClassesController.GetClass(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single class by ID.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.ClassesController.CreateClass(AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.ClassDTO)
member.summary: Create a new class section.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.ClassesController.UpdateClass(System.Int32,AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.ClassDTO)
member.summary: Update an existing class section.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.ClassesController.DeleteClass(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a class by ID.

member.name: T:AMS.Controllers.CoursesController
member.summary: Manages course offerings in the DBTC Attendance Management System.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.CoursesController.GetCourses(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all courses with optional pagination.
member.param: Number of records per page (default: 10, max: 100)
member.returns: Paginated list of courses with teacher and student information.
member.response: Returns the paginated list of courses

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.CoursesController.GetCourse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single course by ID.
member.returns: The course record with teacher and enrolled students.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.CoursesController.CreateCourse(AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.CourseDTO)
member.summary: Create a new course.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.CoursesController.UpdateCourse(System.Int32,AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.CourseDTO)
member.summary: Update an existing course.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.CoursesController.DeleteCourse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a course by ID.

member.name: T:AMS.Controllers.EnrollmentsController
member.summary: Manages student enrollments in the DBTC Attendance Management System.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.EnrollmentsController.GetEnrollments(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all enrollments with optional pagination.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.EnrollmentsController.GetEnrollment(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single enrollment by ID.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.EnrollmentsController.CreateEnrollment(AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.EnrollmentDTO)
member.summary: Create a new enrollment.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.EnrollmentsController.UpdateEnrollment(System.Int32,AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.EnrollmentDTO)
member.summary: Update an existing enrollment.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.EnrollmentsController.DeleteEnrollment(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete an enrollment by ID.

member.name: T:AMS.Controllers.StudentsController
member.summary: Manages student records in the DBTC Attendance Management System.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.StudentsController.GetStudents(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all students with optional pagination.
member.param: Number of records per page (default: 10, max: 100)
member.returns: Paginated list of students with their course information.
member.response: Returns the paginated list of students

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.StudentsController.GetStudent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single student by ID.
member.returns: The student record with course information.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.StudentsController.CreateStudent(AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.StudentDTO)
member.summary: Create a new student.
member.param: Student data: FirstName, LastName, Email, CourseId

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.StudentsController.UpdateStudent(System.Int32,AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.StudentDTO)
member.summary: Update an existing student.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.StudentsController.DeleteStudent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a student by ID.

member.name: T:AMS.Controllers.TeachersController
member.summary: Manages teacher (faculty) records in the DBTC Attendance Management System.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.TeachersController.GetTeachers(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all teachers with optional pagination.
member.param: Number of records per page (default: 10, max: 100)
member.response: Returns the paginated list of teachers

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.TeachersController.GetTeacher(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single teacher by ID.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.TeachersController.CreateTeacher(AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.TeacherDTO)
member.summary: Create a new teacher.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.TeachersController.UpdateTeacher(System.Int32,AttendanceManagementSystem.DTOs.TeacherDTO)
member.summary: Update an existing teacher.

member.name: M:AMS.Controllers.TeachersController.DeleteTeacher(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a teacher by ID.
